portfolio_rationale: LLY leads with exceptional 42.5% revenue growth, the strongest fundamental profile in the universe, and a very weak bear case (confidence 0.4), making it the highest-conviction holding. BRK.B earns the second slot due to the best technical picture this week (price above MA, MACD positive, low volatility) combined with solid fundamentals and no liquidity risk. AAPL provides consistent quality with strong margins and FCF, while AMZN gets a small position on oversold technicals (RSI 25) against strong fundamentals. GOOGL and XOM are excluded due to inconsistent signals/litigation and weak fundamental profile respectively.

LLY.reason: Exceptional 42.5% revenue growth, best fundamental profile in universe, very weak bear case (confidence 0.4), bullish news trends with rising search interest.

BRK.B.reason: Best technical picture in the universe this week with price above MA, MACD above signal, and positive 20-day momentum, combined with solid fundamentals and zero liquidity risk flags.

AAPL.reason: Consistent three-week bullish signal history, strong margins and $51.5B FCF, with liquidity concern well-mitigated by cash generation capacity.

AMZN.reason: RSI at 25.3 signals deeply oversold conditions with rebound potential, supported by strong fundamentals, though persistent technical deterioration limits position size.

GOOGL.reason: Inconsistent signal history (bearish signal two weeks ago), recurring litigation risk flags, and negative 20-day momentum reduce conviction below threshold.

XOM.reason: Weakest fundamental case with only FCF/OCF as bullish factors, negative news sentiment, litigious language, and low ROE of 6.7% do not justify inclusion.
